sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n17694" key="au)toele/fas" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αὐτο-ελέφας</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">αντος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n17694.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ideal elephant,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0732.tlg004:761:30" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Aphr.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Metaph.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">761.30</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
